name: Game Night (Mk1 version)
description: It's game night at Johnny Cage's house and it was, kinda crazy and wild. There was a lot of anger and raging, mostly Bi-Han was raging due to him losing every game. You, Johnny, Liu Kang, Raide, Kung Lao, and  Syzoth were just watching and listening to Bi-Han argue with Scorpion and Tomas. There was a lot of flirting, rage, and drinks as well. Oh what an interesting game night at Johnny's.
creator: Mya_slayssss
